title: AllergyIntolerance → observation / substance-as-value + verificationStatus filter
notes:
OMOP has no dedicated allergy table, so the AllergyIntolerance__observation edge writes each allergy into `observation`, using the allergic substance as BOTH the observation/source concept AND the value concept. One AllergyIntolerance → one observation row.

KEY MAPPING RULES (from mapspec/etl/AllergyIntolerance__observation.sql + mapspec/views/AllergyIntolerance__observation.view.json):
- The stage-1 view extracts the substance code TWICE: code_snomed = code.coding.where(system='http://snomed.info/sct').code.first(), code_rxnorm = code.coding.where(system='http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm').code.first(). The stage-2 CTE UNIONs them with SNOMED at prio 1 and RxNorm at prio 2, then DISTINCT ON (staging_id) ORDER BY prio keeps SNOMED when both are present. Each surviving code is resolved src.concept_id (the source concept in its native vocab) → 'Maps to' (invalid_reason IS NULL) → std.concept_id (standard_concept='S').
- observation_concept_id = std_concept_id; value_as_concept_id = std_concept_id (the SUBSTANCE IS THE VALUE — both columns hold the same standard concept); observation_source_concept_id = src_concept_id (the source code's concept in its native vocab — for these substances the source concept is already standard, so src == std).
- observation_source_value = left(src_code, 50) — the raw substance code string (e.g. '264287008', '7984'), NOT the display.
- value_source_value = left(code.text, 50) — the free-text substance label.
- qualifier_source_value = left(clinicalStatus.coding.first().code, 50) — the allergy clinical-status code ('active'); note Synthea AllergyIntolerance carries system 'allergyintolerance-clinical', but the view reads only .code so the system is irrelevant.
- observation_type_concept_id = 32817 (constant, EHR).
- observation_date / observation_datetime = COALESCE(recordedDate, onset.ofType(dateTime)) cast ::date / ::timestamp (wall-clock, offset DROPPED not applied: recordedDate '2003-08-17T13:44:09+01:00' → datetime '2003-08-17T13:44:09', date '2003-08-17').
- person_id = referenceToId(patient.getReferenceKey()); visit_occurrence_id = referenceToId(encounter.getReferenceKey()) (NULL when AllergyIntolerance has no encounter — Synthea's never do, but the edge maps it when present).
- provider_id, value_as_number, value_as_string, qualifier_concept_id, unit_concept_id, visit_detail_id, unit_source_value, observation_event_id, obs_event_field_concept_id are always NULL for this edge.
- EXCLUSION: WHERE COALESCE(verificationStatus.coding.first().code, 'confirmed') NOT IN ('entered-in-error', 'refuted') — drops refuted / entered-in-error allergies entirely (zero observation rows).

Surrogate PK observation_id = referenceToId(AllergyIntolerance.id) (omitted from expected rows — derived).

All concept_ids verified live in vocab.concept (v20260227 bundle):
- 4138133 'Animal dander' (SNOMED 264287008, Observation, standard 'S', Maps-to self) — environmental allergen.
- 42538933 'Peanut' (SNOMED 762952008, Observation, standard 'S', Maps-to self) — food allergen.
- 1729720 'penicillin V' (RxNorm 7984, Drug, standard 'S', Maps-to self) — drug allergen.
- 32817 'EHR' (Type Concept, standard 'S').
Synthea's whole allergy cohort is clinicalStatus=active / verificationStatus=confirmed, so the verificationStatus filter is exercised with synthetic refuted / entered-in-error variants over the same Animal-dander resource. The substance variants (a SNOMED environmental, a SNOMED food, an RxNorm drug) and the visit-link presence/absence are the only other dimensions that move.

cases.desc: (a) SNOMED environmental allergen (Animal dander) with an encounter → one observation row; substance is both observation_concept_id and value_as_concept_id (4138133); visit_occurrence_id populated
(b) SNOMED food allergen (Peanut), NO encounter → one observation row with visit_occurrence_id NULL; date from recordedDate (offset dropped)
(c) RxNorm drug-coded allergen (Penicillin V) → one observation row; RxNorm path resolves substance 7984 → standard concept 1729720 in the Drug domain
(d) verificationStatus = 'refuted' → excluded by the stage-2 WHERE filter (omop {} — zero observation rows)
(e) verificationStatus = 'entered-in-error' → excluded by the stage-2 WHERE filter (omop {} — zero observation rows)
